# Culture Calendar

> Austin cultural events, AI-curated. Films, concerts, opera, ballet, book clubs, and visual arts — sorted by merit, not marketing.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://hadrien-cornier.github.io/Culture-Calendar/): Top picks of the week plus every upcoming event.
- [How it works](https://hadrien-cornier.github.io/Culture-Calendar/how-it-works.html): Methodology, venues, mailing list.
- [Weekly digest archive](https://hadrien-cornier.github.io/Culture-Calendar/archive.html): Past Monday-morning tipsheets.
- [Venue wishlist](https://hadrien-cornier.github.io/Culture-Calendar/wishlist.html): Venues we would like to add next.

## Subscribable feeds

- [RSS — top picks](https://hadrien-cornier.github.io/Culture-Calendar/feed.xml): RSS 2.0 feed of the top-ranked events.
- [iCal — all events](https://hadrien-cornier.github.io/Culture-Calendar/calendar.ics): Every event as a subscribable calendar.
- [iCal — top picks](https://hadrien-cornier.github.io/Culture-Calendar/top-picks.ics): Only the top-ranked events.
- [Sitemap](https://hadrien-cornier.github.io/Culture-Calendar/sitemap.xml): Every HTML page on the site.

## Categories

- Book club — 20 events
- Concert — 66 events
- Film — 125 events
- Opera — 9 events
- Other — 1 event
- Visual arts — 8 events

## Venues

- [afs](https://hadrien-cornier.github.io/Culture-Calendar/venues/afs.html)
